Bus Timings

Bus 63 Schedule Marina Mall to Al Reem Mall

March 4, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 63 in Abu Dhabi provides a vital link between Marina Mall and Al Reem Mall, serving key areas in the city. This route is an essential part of Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network, offering convenient access to commercial, residential, and recreational areas. The bus is designed to accommodate the daily commuting needs of residents and visitors, making it a reliable choice for navigating between two major shopping destinations in the city.

Route Name 63
Route Description Marina Mall - Al Reem Mall
Total Distance Approximately 14.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 2 hours
Operational Hours 05:15 to 23:30 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 2
Official Website Abu Dhabi Mobility

Download PDF Bus 63

Bus 63 Route in Abu Dhabi

Bus Timings

The bus operates frequently throughout the day, with services running from early morning to late evening. Timings are as follows:

From Marina Mall From Al Reem Mall
05:15 05:12
05:45 05:42
06:00 06:03
06:15 06:18
06:30 06:33
06:45 06:48
07:00 07:03

07:30 07:33

08:30 08:33

10:30 10:43

14:30 14:43

15:30 15:33

23:14  

Bus 63 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or simply follow this link for 63 Bus Timings.

Also See: Detailed Guide to Bus 53 Route and Stops in Dubai

Bus Ticket Price

As of February 2024, the standard bus fare in Abu Dhabi is AED 2, plus an additional AED 0.05 for every kilometer traveled. To use the bus, you’ll need a Hafilat Smart Card, which can be easily purchased and recharged at various locations throughout the city.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 63 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus directly at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates on bus locations and schedules, passengers can use the Abu Dhabi Public Transport app or check the official website. This app provides information on bus timings, route maps, and live bus tracking to enhance the travel experience.

Bus Route

The Bus 63 route connects Marina Mall with Al Reem Mall, passing through several important landmarks and neighborhoods. Key stops include:

  1. Marina Mall

  2. Nation Towers

  3. Federal National Council

  4. Family Beach

  5. Al Bateen Street

  6. Abu Dhabi — Commercial International Bank

  7. Abu Dhabi — Public Beach Main Entrance

  8. Mubarak Bin Mohammed Street

  9. Family Park

  10. Landmark Tower

  11. ADCCI

  12. World Trade Centre

  13. Central Souq

  14. Al Noor Hospital

  15. Fatima Bint Mubarak Street

  16. Zayed The First Street

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. ADNOC

  2. Al Jali Street

  3. ADWEA

  4. GEMS American Academy

  5. Al Musharaka Street

  6. Marina Square

  7. Al Zaffat Street

  8. Al Zawi Street

  9. Al Falaq Street

  10. Sorbonne University

  11. Al ‘Oud Street

  12. Stop 1052

  13. Al Reem Mall

Tourist Destination Along the Way

  1. Marina Mall: A major shopping and entertainment hub featuring a wide range of shops, dining options, and a cinema.

  2. Family Beach: A popular beach destination for families, offering recreational activities and beautiful views of the coastline.

3.

  1. Central Souq: A traditional market where visitors can experience local culture and shop for unique souvenirs and goods.

  2. Al Noor Hospital: Renowned for its quality healthcare services, it also stands out as a landmark in Abu Dhabi.

6.

  1. Sorbonne University: An esteemed institution of higher learning that adds a cultural and academic dimension to the route.

  2. GEMS American Academy: An international school known for its high educational standards.

  3. Al Reem Mall: A modern shopping center offering a variety of retail options, dining experiences, and entertainment facilities.

These locations make Bus Route 63 not only a practical choice for daily commutes but also a gateway to exploring some of Abu Dhabi’s key attractions and landmarks.

Journey Experience

Passing by modern skyscrapers, parks, and key landmarks, the trip offers glimpses of the city’s vibrant life.

Read More: Abu Dhabi Bus 67: Detailed Route and Stop Information

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Al Reem Mall, the furthest point on the Bus 63 route starting from Marina Mall, with a price range of AED 36-43. This convenient option allows you to easily reach your destination while enjoying the flexibility and comfort of a private ride. Plus, Careem’s user-friendly interface ensures a smooth booking experience for a stress-free journey.

Whether you’re heading to Marina Mall for shopping or exploring Al Reem Mall, Bus 63 offers a convenient and efficient way to travel across Abu Dhabi. With its frequent service and well-planned route, it ensures easy access to major landmarks and essential destinations in the city. Ideal for both residents and visitors, Bus 63 seamlessly connects key areas, making it an essential part of Abu Dhabi’s public transport network.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 4, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
